description: This award-winning appliance is an essential for professional UK bakers, providing a stable, humid environment for perfect dough rising. This specific variant features a dual-mode function, operating as both a precise bread proofer with settings from 21-49°C and a slow cooker reaching up to 90°C using your own Dutch oven. The package includes the collapsible proofer unit, a stainless steel wire rack, an aluminum water tray for humidity control, a detachable UK power cord, and an instruction manual. Its ingenious folding design collapses into a slim profile for efficient kitchen storage.
features: Temperature range: 21–90°C; Power output: 200W; Anodised aluminium base plate; Calibrated specifically for consistent low-temperature stability; Accommodates up to an 8L stock pot or two 1kg bannetons.
uses: Proving yeast doughs (sourdough, sweet buns); Making yoghurt; Melting chocolate; Slow cooking stews and casseroles; Making black garlic; Culturing soft cheeses.

accessories.name: Water Tray
accessories.description: Stainless steel tray for maintaining humidity during proving.

accessories.name: Proving Rack
accessories.description: Wire rack to elevate containers above the heating plate.

name: Brod & Taylor Folding Proofer & Slow Cooker (FP-205)
